headline: BP’s Ousted Chairman Manifold Disputes Wrongdoing Claims
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Former BP Plc Chairman Albert Manifold pushed back against what he described as a “false narrative” surrounding his surprise departure from the British supermajor.
